data.title: Handyman Roofing Teams Up Clearwater Little League for the 2026 Spring Season
data.description: In Clearwater, Florida on March 12, 2026, Handyman Roofing, a longstanding presence in the Suncoast neighborhoods, revealed their partnership with the Clearwater Little League for the upcoming Spring season of 2026. With over 40 years of experience, Handyman Roofing has been a trusted service provider for homeowners in Clearwater and the surrounding areas. The sponsorship with the Clearwater Little League signifies the company's commitment to supporting local community initiatives.

data.title: Heven AeroTech Awarded U.S. Army Basic Ordering Agreement Under UAS Project Office at Redstone Arsenal
data.description: Heven AeroTech, a leading U.S. company specializing in hydrogen-powered unmanned aerial systems (UAS), has granted BOA with the qualification to use its Z1 UAS Select. This long-endurance aircraft is powered by hydrogen and marks a significant advancement in the industry. The announcement was made in Sterling, Virginia on March 12, 2026. This partnership opens up new possibilities for BOA as they incorporate this cutting-edge technology into their operations.

data.title: Berger Montague PC Investigating Potential Claims on Behalf of goeasy Ltd. Investors (OTC: EHMEF)
data.description: In a recent development on March 12, 2026, Berger Montague PC, a prominent plaintiffs' law firm, disclosed their intentions to scrutinize possible claims against goeasy Ltd. (OTC: EHMEF) ("goeasy" or the "Company"). This investigation is aiming to represent investors who procured goeasy shares within a specific timeframe. The firm will be delving into the details to ascertain any potential legal recourse for these investors.

data.title: Metropolitan Dermatology Opens 23rd Office in Williamstown, NJ, Expanding Access to Same-Day Dermatology Care
data.description: In Williamstown, New Jersey, Metropolitan Dermatology recently opened its 23rd office, further enhancing access to top-notch dermatologic care for patients in South Jersey. The new location signifies a significant milestone for the practice, showcasing its commitment to serving the community. This expansion signifies the practice's dedication to offering quality healthcare services, ensuring that more individuals can benefit from their expertise.

data.title: Legacy Ridge Private Wealth Joins LPL Strategic Wealth
data.description: Today, LPL Financial LLC revealed that financial advisors Frank Boley, CFA®, CFP®, CIMA®, and Susie Garber-Johnson, CWS®, have established a new independent practice titled Legacy Ridge Private Wealth. This move was made in collaboration with LPL Financial’s supported independence platform, LPL Strategic Wealth. The advisors have disclosed that their services cater to around $600 million in advisory, brokerage, and retirement plan assets*. They made the transition from D.A. Davidson to LPL for this new venture.

EDB continues to lead the way in pioneering a sovereign AI platform vision. Based in WILMINGTON, Del., as of March 12, 2026, EnterpriseDB (EDB) maintains its status as the top sovereign AI and data firm in the industry.

data.title: NevGold Mobilizes Drill To Test Historical Leach Pads To Advance The Near-Term Antimony Production Scenario at Limo Butte
data.description: Vancouver, BC, March 12, 2026 - NevGold Corp. ("NevGold" or "the Company") has obtained permits and is mobilizing a drill rig to its Limousine Butte Project ("Project", "Limo Butte") in Nevada. The drilling will focus on testing the historical gold heap leach pads for antimony, aiming to advance them for near-term antimony production. This project represents one of the few near-term, at-surface antimony production opportunities in the US, with a potential path to antimony metal production by 2027. Nevgold is listed on the TSXV as NAU, OTCQX as NAUFF, and Frankfurt as 5E50.

data.title: Forrester Continues To Use AI To Transform How Research And Advisory Insights Are Delivered To Clients
data.description: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, Forrester (Nasdaq: FORR) has revealed that their Forrester AI tool, formerly known as Izola, is now certified for Microsoft Teams and can be accessed as an app in the Microsoft Marketplace. This Forrester AI Teams app is complimentary for existing clients of Forrester and offers a fresh avenue to obtain their exclusive research, data, and frameworks which are not accessible via public AI models. This development enables Forrester's clients to make more intelligent, well-informed, and data-driven decisions.

data.title: Pharma Leaders Discuss Managing Revenue Management System Updates at Model N Rainmaker Panel Hosted by RevSavvy
data.description: In response to heightened regulatory pressures, particularly with the implementation of IRA pricing reforms, there has been a notable uptick in the utilization of RevSavvy's ARC platform and consulting services by pharmaceutical firms. This is aimed at aiding these companies in effectively handling system upgrades, testing, and ensuring adherence to compliance standards. Based in Chicago, as of March 12, 2026, RevSavvy has witnessed a significant surge in adoption rates, reflecting the industry's need for support in this area.

data.title: Cartier Cuts 7.1 g/t Au over 8.0 m at Portal (Cadillac); New Shallow High-Grade Gold Zone Discovered
data.description: A significant discovery has been made by Cartier, with a high-grade zone yielding 7.1 grams per ton of gold over 8 meters at Portal on the Cadillac Project. This confirms the presence of a new shallow high-grade area near the historic ramp. The project is fully owned by Cartier and has shown promising results with this recent finding.
